subject: [COMMON] Fix problem with useNodePortExt
commit_message:
[COMMON] Fix problem with useNodePortExt

Fix so that the useNodePortExt flag is honored when
creating a k8s Service with the service template.

Issue-ID: OOM-2679
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflos@sonoris.net>
Change-Id: I40ff3ab6df28ee1f9c582dff35a5360f632accbd

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/464/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/464/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/464/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/464
